analysis.reasoning: Core message: Cites Premier Li saying peace, development, cooperation, and exchange are the trend; regardless of external changes, China will open wider and keep advancing in opening-up. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not present; no criticism of the West or depiction of hostility. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) – Yes; emphasizes peaceful development, cooperation, openness to the world, projecting China as cooperative and beneficial internationally. CH3 (epic history) – Not referenced. CH4 (appropriate political system/values, domestically) – Partially adjacent but not supported; the focus is international openness, not domestic political system or values. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) – Implicit confidence but no concrete claims of domestic achievements or leadership; not clearly promoted. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage) – Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
